For S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Defend the Directory Session Reactivation model · Theory Directory S…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: A dormant directory bucket either responds normally or is permanently unavailable. Type annotations, generated SDK shapes, and resolved promises do not strengthen that runtime claim.
